title: euphorbia milii var. vulcani
intro: Euphorbia milii var. vulcani, also known as the fire cactus or fire stick, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia milii var. vulcani include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the healing of burns and other skin irritations. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often employed in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
